test.name: Run All Register User Test Cases From Excel

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.msg: Element 'xpath://img[@alt='Website for automation practice']' is displayed.
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify New User SignUp is Visible
Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'New User Signup!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test User' into text field 'xpath://input[@placeholder='Name']'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Account Information Page Is Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:days' by value 15.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:months' by label March.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:years' by value 1995.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Test Company' into text field 'id:company'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123 Test Street' into text field 'id:address1'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id:country' by label United States.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Los Angeles' into text field 'id:city'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
